title: Item Flicker
description: Dropped items flicker before disappearing. Inspired by ClearDespawn.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3f5262aec321a6b514c6fc62e79c24a7d7b08de_0.webp)

----


**Item Flicker** is a mod that makes items flicker before despawning. Several parameters can be adjusted in the configuration, making the mod quite versatile.
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/zGZ0fhfBE0g" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Item Flicker owes its inspiration entirely to [ClearDespawn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cleardespawn) and is being developed as its conceptual continuation.

Requires [Architectury API](https://modrinth.com/mod/architectury-api) and [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) to work.
